indications_and_usage: Uses For temporary relief of pain due to toothaches and sure gums.
dosage_and_administration: Directions: (For adults and children 12 years or older) wash hands Remove cap and cut off tip dispenser use your finger or cotton applicator (swab) to apply a small (pea-size) amount of Anestenka to the affected area Apply Anestenka to the affected area up to 4 times daily or as directed by the demtist or doctor For children 12 years of age: Consult a dentist or doctor
